observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with surface marking
Visual pattern suggesting printed mark or stain
Localized deviation from normal hazelnut appearance
mechanism_explanation: Unintended marking from contact with contaminated surfaces.
severity_visual_description: minor printed mark or stain visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Clean contact surfaces and add protective film.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the printed mark or stain would be absent and surface appears normal.
